developer_response.body: Hello, thank you for being a Founder! Please reach out to support@3lbgames.com with a screenshot of your purchase receipt and we’ll get you set up.

reviews.review_description:
UPDATE: 28.10.25. I had to delete my original review as I was unable to update in the meta app or on the website. I copied the developers response below for reference though. 

Thanks for the quick reply. I did try both ways, clicking wait and also close app, neither way worked. Happy to try again when there is a fix. Do let me know. Thanks. 

————————— 
ORIGINAL REVIEW FROM 26.10.25. I gave one star as unplayable. Launches then get a box saying exit or wait. Tried a number of times but no luck. Can't do anything. 

If it’s fixed i am happy to try again.

————————— 
DEVELOPER RESPONSE 27.10.25. 
Hello Indiesides, This is a bug we are actively trying to resolve, sorry to hear you are running into it. We find it will often clear up if you select Close App and reopen rather than selecting Wait, but that may not always be the case. Please reach out to us if you have any additional information, we will update as soon as we have a fix.
—————————

developer_response.body:
Hello Indiesides,
Thank you for the update! We have pushed out a hotfix that should fix the crash issue, please give it a try when you are able. We really appreciate your feedback and your patience while we stomp this bug.

reviews.review_description:
A fun collection of minigames to play solo or multiplayer!

There are a few awkward rough spots, but by and large this is a really fun experience. Good variety in gameplay and environments, great sound design.

This is a wonderful multiplayer game that uses hand-tracking mechanics, which is awesome since my controller batteries are almost always low. Tons of different mini games to choose from, as well as character customization options you can unlock the longer you play. There are lots of cool VR environments to choose from, as well as mixed reality features that make it feel like my friends are right there in my living room with me. Lots of fun to be had with your friends, and also just as fun to play solo. Highly recommend giving this game a try!

First, Grokit the game is just slammin' fun. I love its creativity and artwork. It's a blast, pun intended. 
If you've always wanted shark hands, now you have them. But what's best about it is it's mixed reality, co-presence, so your friends are in your living room, and you're in theirs. 
But what the coolest is Grokit the demo is also Gro-kit Core, the Unity SDK which let's you build your own games, taking care of the hard part so you can be creative and build your own.

Highly recommended!
I love this app. So many cool things to do.,
Fun, funny, charming, and imaginative. Glad I picked it up.

Great App Lab title with super accurate hand tracking, who doesn’t want sharks for hands!!  Several mini games all different to work through and I guess the devs have more up their sleeve. Couldn’t figure out the mini game with bombs, I think its co-op mode.  Occasionally whilst trying to pop balloons or eat fish with my shark hands they escaped beyond my boundary.  Still a fun game and one to look out for at a great price point.

developer_response.body: The bomb game is more or less hot potato and is really the only game that has to be multiplayer to be played correctly. Thank you for playing!

reviews.review_description:
Wow, what a hidden gem.
The mini games are such awesome fun, the mixed reality mode is just brilliant.
No need for controllers, I used my hands and they turned into shark chomping heads snapping up fish, it’s hilarious fun.
O can’t wait to get in and play more.
Well done to the devs for a great experience.
Hand tracking and mixed reality to show off the quest 3 mixed reality. 4 player mini games that are fun to play with friends
This game is awesome and any person who has a VR headset needs this game!!! Quest 3 runs it amazingly!!

developer_response.body: So glad you enjoyed it! Thank you, Knuckles.

reviews.review_description: Grokit is a great example of the potential of mixed reality and social VR experience. It’s a fun and cute experience that’s great with friends

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing, Scruffles! Be sure to check out the winter update.

reviews.review_title: Actual laugh out loud controlled chaos
reviews.review_description: Sometimes you run into a game where fun seems to be at its core. Grokit takes a big chomp at that. Pun intended. Chomp *is* one of the best mini games in Grokit, and the other games are crazy chaos, too.  It is a welcome change when the competition element  is as fierce as it is playful. Good on ya for kinda building that into this one. With planned updates like the holiday bit and hopefully lots of others, things should freshen up nicely in Grokit from time to time. We need more mixed reality efforts like this. Good fun with friends.

developer_response.body: Fun and chaos were the top priorities when designing it. Thank you for playing!

reviews.review_description:
The game has a lot of minigames, has a really great handtracking and MR, so it makes the best use of Quest 3, although you can also have a lot of fun on Quest 2. 
I hope the ability to chat between players will come in the update - the multiplayer option is available and you can play in two people. That's when the fun is at its best. And when the option of voice comes along - it will be even better!
So if you are looking for a set of mini-games for your child - this is a great choice. Older players can treat this title as an interlude between other titles, preferably just for two people.

developer_response.body: Voice chat is on our roadmap for sure! And yes, we designed Grokit to be a game for quick play sessions with friends and family. As much as we love VR, we don't always have an hour or more free to get together to game. Sometimes 15-30 minutes is all we can spare and not enough games allow for that. Thank you for playing!

reviews.review_title: Fantastic MR Game for my kids
reviews.review_description: My kids love this game Mixed realty

developer_response.body: Thank you! We're so glad they're enjoying it.
